sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا حِمَايَةُ بَيَانَاتِنَا الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عِنْدَ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo zaštititi svoje lične podatke prilikom korištenja interneta.
sentences.translationEn: We must protect our personal data when using the internet.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَحْتَاجُ إِلَى كَلِمَاتِ مُرُورٍ قَوِيَّةٍ لِحِسَابَاتِنَا الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Potrebne su nam jake lozinke za naše elektronske račune.
sentences.translationEn: We need strong passwords for our electronic accounts.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَفْتَحْ أَيَّ رَوَابِطَ مَجْهُولَةٍ لِتَجَنُّبِ الِاخْتِرَاقِ وَالْفَيْرُوسَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ne otvarajte nikakve nepoznate linkove kako biste izbjegli hakovanje i viruse.
sentences.translationEn: Do not open any unknown links to avoid hacking and viruses.
